title: Finance
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The AI Skills Gap Is Becoming A Real Business Risk
items.description: AI is scaling faster than workforce readiness. EC-Council’s new role-based AI certifications aim to help close the growing skills and governance gap.

items.title: ‘The fiscal trajectory is not sustainable’: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
